subject: Re: empty .star file after template matching
body:
there isn't really enough info for me to help you - you need to verify you
can correctly run the tutorial then identify what is different about
running template matching on your data

Cheers,

Alister

On Mon, 2 Dec 2024 at 18:40, Pankaj Vilas Jadhav <pvjadhav@umich.edu> wrote:

> Hi Alister,
> Thanks for the prompt response.
> I am just processing this one tomogram. The correlation volume looks fine.
>
> Best,
> Pankaj
>
> On Monday, December 2, 2024 at 5:52:04 PM UTC-5 alist...@gmail.com wrote:
>
>> Hi Pankaj,
>>
>> Is there anything wrong with this tomogram? How does the correlation
>> volume look compared to others?
>>
>> Cheers,
>>
>> Alister
>>
>> On Mon, 2 Dec 2024 at 14:45, Pankaj Vilas Jadhav <pvja...@umich.edu>
>> wrote:
>>
>>> Hi,
>>> I am using WarpTools for picking ribosomes from my tomograms.
>>> The template matching ends with the following error message:
>>>
>>> Unhandled exception. System.InvalidOperationException: Sequence contains
>>> no elements
>>>    at System.Linq.ThrowHelper.ThrowNoElementsException()
>>>    at
>>> System.Linq.Enumerable.Average[TSource,TAccumulator,TResult](IEnumerable`1
>>> source)
>>>    at System.Linq.Enumerable.Average(IEnumerable`1 source)
>>>    at WarpTools.Commands.TemplateMatchTiltseries.Run(Object options) in
>>> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpTools/Commands/Tiltseries/TemplateMatchTiltseries.cs:line
>>> 297
>>>    at WarpTools.WarpTools.Run(Object options) in
>>> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line
>>> 30
>>>    at Warp.Tools.CommandLineParserHelper.ParseAndRun(String[] args,
>>> Func`2 run, Type[] verbs, String appName) in
>>> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpLib/Tools/CommandLineParserHelper.cs:line
>>> 26
>>>    at WarpTools.WarpTools.Main(String[] args) in
>>> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line
>>> 17
>>>    at WarpTools.WarpTools.<Main>(String[] args)
>>> /programs/share/capsules/lib/job.sh: line 126: 2709168
>>> Aborted                 (core dumped) "$SB_EXECFILE" "$@"
>>> ################################################################
>>>
>>> All the expected files are generated in the "matching" folder.
>>> L2_1__ts_003_8.48Apx_emd_13270_angleid.tif
>>>  L2_1__ts_003_8.48Apx_emd_13270_picks
>>> L2_1__ts_003_8.48Apx_emd_13270_corr.mrc
>>> L2_1__ts_003_8.48Apx_emd_13270.star
>>>
>>> However the .star is empty and the .tif files in the picks folder are
>>> all blank.
>>>
>>> Please let me know how can I fix this.
>>>
>>> Thanks for your help,
>>> Pankaj.
>>>
>>> --
>>> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google
>>> Groups "Warp" group.
>>> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send
>>> an email to warp-em+u...@googlegroups.com.
>>> To view this discussion visit
>>> https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/c7533a85-0e59-4626-ae8e-af304ae2bcb4n%40googlegroups.com
>>> <https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/c7533a85-0e59-4626-ae8e-af304ae2bcb4n%40googlegroups.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=footer>
>>> .
>>>
